package.name: porter_lidar_processor_cpp
package.description: High-performance C++17 LIDAR scan processor for Porter Robot. Subscribes to /scan, applies a configurable 6-stage filter pipeline (range clamp, MAD outlier rejection, median, exponential smoothing, ROI crop, downsample), publishes /scan/processed and /diagnostics. Drop-in replacement for the Python porter_lidar_processor package.
